summary: Comprehensive testing of DreamerV3 Phase 2 — Advanced Trading APIs and QUANT tab UI. All 26 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend QUANT tab features verified without crash.

issues: Reset button only appears when circuit_state !== 'NORMAL'. Users cannot manually reset in NORMAL state which is fine but may confuse users who want to test the button — minor UX consideration.

critical_code_review_comments: observability/metrics_engine.py uses in-memory global state (_kill_switch, _circuit_state, _metrics, _pnl_history). All state is lost on server restart — acceptable for MVP but document for production.

advanced_router.py: /risk/approvals endpoint has complex __import__ chain (lines 220-226) to access module-level _approval_queue — this should use the existing get_pending_approvals() function for cleaner code.

SentimentPanel.jsx line 92: eslint would flag fetchAll as a missing dependency in useEffect (line 88) since it depends on ticker but doesn't include fetchAll in deps array. No functional bug since selectedStock change triggers correctly.

ObservabilityPanel.jsx: the 'cell' prop on BarChart Bar component (line 157) uses an inline function that returns a <rect> element — this is not the correct Recharts API for conditional coloring (should use a custom Cell from recharts). Current code renders bars in single color but no crash.

PortfolioOptimizerPanel.jsx period buttons (lines 95-99): period comparison '6mo' vs p value '6mo' is fine, but '1y' and '2y' are also set correctly. Minor: the comparison `period === p` works correctly.
server.py is extremely large (>10,000 lines) — the advanced_router.py and observability/metrics_engine.py are properly modularized which is good practice.
seed_data_creation: Test trades recorded via POST /api/advanced/observability/record-trade during backend tests (in-memory, reset on server restart)
context_for_next_testing_agent: DreamerV3 Phase 2 (QUANT tab) fully tested and working. Backend: All 22 routes in advanced_router.py work correctly. Circuit breaker (NORMAL/WARNING/TRIPPED), kill switch (activate/deactivate), reset circuit, record-trade, metrics, alerts, prometheus, fear-greed index, news sentiment, hedge-suggest (returns Protective Put + Collar strategies), smart-route (returns TWAP strategy with slices), per-stats (enabled field present), risk-reward (enabled field present). Frontend: QUANT tab is the 9th tab in the right sidebar (data-testid=tab-quant). Sub-tabs Portfolio/Risk/Sentiment/Observ. all render without crash. Portfolio has ticker textarea + Optimize Portfolio button. Risk has Kill Switch Activate button + circuit status badge. Sentiment has Fear & Greed SVG gauge (showing NEUTRAL) + ticker input + Fetch button. Observability Dreamer tab has continuous-toggle-btn (Start/Stop for online training). No JS errors or crashes observed.

api_responses_verified.GET /api/advanced/observability/promethe: Prometheus text format with gann_trader_* metrics
api_responses_verified.POST /api/advanced/portfolio/hedge-sugge: strategies array with Protective Put + Collar
